ABOUT.TITLE: Intelligent automation, made in Costa Rica
ABOUT.P1: We are Vectis: an engineering team in San José, Costa Rica, building software, automation and AI for clients all over the world. “Vectis” means lever in Latin — and that is what we do: with a well-built system, a small company performs like a big one.
ABOUT.P2: We build the “invisible employee”: custom systems that connect to the tools you already use and handle repetitive work on their own, tirelessly, around the clock. We don’t sell off-the-shelf software — we build it for you and leave it running.
ABOUT.P3: Our philosophy: diagnosis before prescription. First we understand your real problem, then we build. Reliable, measurable technology designed to give back your most expensive resource: time.

PRECISION.TITLE: Precision
PRECISION.DESC: Every line of code has a clear purpose.

SPEED.TITLE: Speed
SPEED.DESC: We iterate fast without sacrificing quality.

IMPACT.TITLE: Impact
IMPACT.DESC: We measure results, not just deliverables.

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Everything you need to know before working with us.

Q1.A: We build custom software, websites and web apps, mobile apps, automations and artificial intelligence, plus integrations, APIs and data & analytics solutions. With particular strength in automating repetitive administrative processes.

Q2.Q: Which technologies do you specialize in?
Q2.A: We work with Angular, React, Next.js and Node across frontend and backend; Python and LLMs (OpenAI, Claude) for AI; and cloud such as AWS. We pick the stack based on each project's goal.

Q3.Q: Do you work with clients outside Costa Rica?
Q3.A: Yes. We're based in San José, Costa Rica, but we work with clients all over the world, remotely and across time zones.

Q4.Q: How long does a project take?
Q4.A: Our automation systems are up and running in about 2 weeks: days 1–3 diagnosis, 4–10 build and integration, and 11–14 testing with real data and go-live. Larger projects ship in phases.

Q5.A: Diagnosis → Design → Build → Ongoing support. We start by understanding your real problem before proposing a solution, with iterative delivery and frequent demos so you see real progress.

Q6.Q: How much does it cost and how do you charge?
Q6.A: We offer fixed-scope projects or dedicated monthly teams (staff augmentation). After an intro call we send a proposal with pricing and timeline.

Q7.Q: Do you offer support and maintenance?
Q7.A: Yes. We provide ongoing support, monitoring and evolutive maintenance so your product keeps running and improving after launch.

Q8.Q: Can you integrate with our current tools?
Q8.A: Absolutely. We build integrations and pipelines with your systems, CRMs, ERPs and third-party services via APIs and webhooks.

Q9.Q: Do you work with startups and large companies?
Q9.A: Both. We support startups from MVP and established companies on products at scale, adapting the team and process to each case.

Q10.Q: How do we start working together?
Q10.A: Easy: book a call or message us from the Contact section. We'll talk through your idea and propose the next steps.

PRIVACY.META_DESC: How Vectis Automation Group collects, uses and protects your personal information.
PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.INTRO: At Vectis Automation Group we respect your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through our website and forms, and how we use it.

S1.B: Vectis Automation Group, based in San José, Costa Rica. For any question about your data, write to us at contact@wearevectis.com.

S2.B: We collect the information you voluntarily provide through our contact, appointment and newsletter forms. This may include: name, email, company, subject, estimated budget and the message you send us. We do not collect sensitive data.

S3.H: Use of your email and form information
S3.B: We may use your email and the information you submit through our forms to: respond to your request, contact you, schedule meetings or appointments, prepare proposals, and send you communications and information related to our services. By submitting a form, you agree that we may use that data for these purposes.

S4.B: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we will use your email to send you news, content and updates. You can unsubscribe at any time using the opt-out link or by writing to contact@wearevectis.com.

S5.B: We keep your information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described, or while we maintain a relationship with you, unless the law requires a different period.

S6.B: We do not sell or rent your information. We only share it with trusted providers that help us operate the site and communicate with you (for example, email or hosting services), always under confidentiality obligations.

S7.B: The site may use cookies or similar technologies to work properly and, if enabled, to measure usage anonymously. You can control cookies from your browser settings. If we add analytics or marketing tools, we will display a consent notice.

S8.B: You can request access, correction or deletion of your personal data, as well as object to its processing, by writing to contact@wearevectis.com. We will handle your request in accordance with applicable law.

S9.B: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the current version on this page with its update date.

PRIVACY.CONTACT_LINE: Questions about your privacy? Write to us at

TERMS.META_DESC: Terms and conditions for using the website and services of Vectis Automation Group.
TERMS.TITLE: Terms & Conditions
TERMS.INTRO: These terms and conditions govern the use of the Vectis Automation Group website and requests for our services. By using the site or submitting a form, you accept these terms.

S1.B: By accessing and using this website you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

S2.B: You agree to use the site lawfully and not to take any action that could damage it, disrupt its operation or infringe the rights of third parties.

S3.B: Information on the site is informational and does not constitute a binding offer. Services are governed by the specific proposals or contracts we agree in writing with each client.

S4.B: By submitting a contact, appointment or subscription form, you confirm the information provided is accurate and agree that Vectis may contact you to follow up on your request. Processing of your data is governed by our Privacy Policy.

S5.B: The site content (text, design, logo and the Vectis brand) is owned by Vectis Automation Group or its licensors. It may not be reproduced or used without prior authorization.

S6.B: The site may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

S7.B: The site is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, Vectis shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, the site.

S8.B: We may update these terms at any time. The current version will be posted on this page with its update date.

S9.B: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Costa Rica, without prejudice to any applicable consumer protection rules.

TERMS.CONTACT_LINE: Questions about these terms? Write to us at
